title: Beyond Distributed Locks: How Apple’s FoundationDB Scales Global Consistency
description: Stop reaching for distributed locks. Learn how decoupling sequencing from storage allows systems to achieve strict serializability without the performance tax of traditional locking mechanisms.

title: Virtual Threads Are Not Enough: Why Structured Concurrency Changes How You Reason About Concurrent Code
description: Virtual threads solve throughput. Structured concurrency solves correctness. This article explains why the second half of Project Loom matters more for writing concurrent code you can actually reason about.
